metadata.title: ECS Portfolio Power BI Dataset
metadata.author: Ariful Haque
metadata.purpose: Portfolio-level Power BI dashboard — SSE ECS Team

FACT_Milestones.Notes: Delivered on time. All stakeholders aligned.
Delivered 3 days early. MSAL testing passed.
BUG-02 mobile performance issue adding 1 week.
Dependent on Dashboard milestone. Cascading delay risk.
Contingency absorbed earlier slippage.
Board approval received early.
Well-Architected Review delayed pending resource.
Pilot scope agreed. Team confirmed.
Dependent on successful pilot.
OData feed stable. Data refresh confirmed.
On track. DAX measures in final review.
Work item types configured in ADO tenant.
Finance challenged ROI assumptions. Rework required.
Dependent on business case approval.
Supplier API access provisioning delayed.
Cumulative delay from earlier milestones.
All 47 controls assessed. 8 gaps identified.
Plan signed off by CISO.
6 of 8 gaps on track. 2 need supplier action.
External auditor booked for w/c 28 July.
Final sprint delivered ahead of schedule.
Field engineers signed off. 2 minor bugs logged.
Delivered 2 weeks early. Strong field adoption.
Integration complexity higher than scoped. Change request raised.
Cascading from build delay.
Finance blackout period means earliest go-live is 21 July.

FACT_RAID.Title: Azure AD rate limit under peak load
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Load test to 60k concurrent users. Engage Microsoft for rate limit uplift.

FACT_RAID.Title: Smart Meter API downtime risk
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Implement caching. Show 'Data as of [timestamp]' when API unavailable.

FACT_RAID.Title: BUG-01: SSO fails for special character UPN
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Hotfix encoding UPN before MSAL token request. Due 14 April.

FACT_RAID.Title: Key developer departure risk
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Knowledge transfer sessions. Confluence documentation. Cross-train backup.

FACT_RAID.Title: Smart Meter API access from Data Platform
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Escalated to Data Platform lead. Provisional access expected 25 April.

FACT_RAID.Title: Azure Landing Zone delayed by resource gap
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Engage specialist contractor. Target Landing Zone by 15 May.

FACT_RAID.Title: Existing network VLAN config compatible with Azure
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Validate with network team by 15 April. Raise as risk if incompatible.

FACT_RAID.Title: Migration scope growth — servers 30% above estimate
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Re-baseline migration scope. Raise change request with revised timeline.

FACT_RAID.Title: MI Pack delayed by JIRA API rate limit failure
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Switched to Azure DevOps OData feed. Added 2-hour production buffer.

FACT_RAID.Title: Power BI Premium licence cost not in baseline
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Confirmed 12 licences needed. Change request raised to finance.

FACT_RAID.Title: Business case rejected — ROI assumptions challenged
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Revised ROI model in progress. CFO review scheduled 28 April.

FACT_RAID.Title: Smart Meter supplier API breaking changes in Q3
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Build version-agnostic wrapper. Subscribe to API changelog alerts.

FACT_RAID.Title: Supplier unable to remediate 2 security controls
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Identify alternative compensating controls. Engage legal on contract breach.

FACT_RAID.Title: SAP integration complexity — undiscovered dependencies
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Additional discovery sprint approved. Change request for revised timeline.

FACT_RAID.Title: Go-live conflicts with finance period-end close
FACT_RAID.MitigationAction: Finance blackout 1-21 July. Revised go-live target 21 July minimum.

DIM_Team.SkillTags: Power BI; Azure DevOps; PMP; RAID; Financial Reporting
Azure; Azure AD; MSAL; DevOps; Networking
ISO27001; NIST; Pen Testing; Compliance; Risk

Portfolio Governance; RAID; Finance; Resource Planning

FACT_Benefits.BenefitName: Reduction in call centre volume — digital self-service
FACT_Benefits.Notes: Target: 15% reduction in call volume. Measured by call centre KPI report post go-live.
Target: NPS increase from 42 to 57. Quarterly survey post go-live.

FACT_Benefits.BenefitName: Cloud infrastructure cost reduction vs. on-prem
FACT_Benefits.Notes: Target: 30% opex reduction. Baseline set at £420k/yr on-prem.
Target: 99.9% uptime vs current 99.1%. SLA enforced via Azure Monitor.
Actual: Time reduced from 4hrs to 45min confirmed by PMO. Annualised saving £52k.
Target: 0 MI pack errors requiring rework. Currently 2-3 per month.
ICO fine for non-compliance estimated £2.5M. Compliance avoids this exposure.
Average breach cost £180k. Improved posture reduces probability by est. 40%.
App deployed. Engineers saving avg 45 min/day. 140 engineers = £110k/yr.
Delayed go-live reduces benefit realisation window. Revised to £105k.
